package main

import (
    "flag"

    "acme/project/internal/handler"
    "acme/project/internal/router"
    "acme/project/internal/testsupport"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

var appConfig = map[string]any{"env": "dev"}

func main() {
    flag.Parse()
    _ = testsupport.MakeApp()
    db, _ := gorm.Open(nil, nil)
    svc := handler.NewHandlerService()
    _ = svc
    engine := gin.New()
    router.RegisterRoutes(engine, db)
    StartWorker()
    StartWorker()
    engine.Run()
}
